title: Squish
description: Fast local LLMs on Apple Silicon: sub-second model loads, faster than Ollama on long prompts. OpenAI and Ollama-compatible.

items.title: I Couldn't Find a Local LLM Tool Fast Enough, So I Built My Own
items.content_html: A local LLM inference server for Apple Silicon, 1.15 to 14.7× faster than Ollama depending on how much your prompts repeat, with the honest benchmarks.
